title: Rule of Cool
shortVersion: Creative and interesting ideas deserve a fair chance.
fullExplanation: The rules matter, but memorable roleplay, clever solutions, and dramatic moments matter too. The DM may allow an idea, ask for a roll, add a cost, or create a consequence.
whyTheTableUsesIt: It encourages players to describe interesting actions instead of only pressing rules buttons.
exampleInPlay: A player tries to swing from a chandelier, kick an enemy, and land behind cover. The DM decides what roll is needed and what can go wrong.
exceptions: It does not erase danger, invalidate another character, or guarantee success.
